message:
refactor(agent-drivers): remove redundant updateState calls in doSend

Both ACP and Tmux drivers were calling updateState to set "thinking"
state in their doSend methods, but this is already done by the base
driver's send() method before calling doSend(). Removed the redundant
calls and added clarifying comments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
